meaning: n.小袋,烟草袋,钱袋,育儿袋vt.把...装入袋中,使成袋状vi.成袋状
examples: Joe Bob took out his pipe and dug it into a pouch of tobacco.
Some marsupials can care for three newborns in their pouch at the same time.
The kangaroo has a pouch where babies live until they can hop around on their own.
How many iPhones will be purloined from around unsuspecting necks before this pouch concept gets canned?
It is an inflatable pouch that has a thin-film solar panel with two-coin cell rechargeable batteries.
